cases.prompt: Create the configured SRS for a Laravel service from the supplied product notes. Several authorization and retention decisions are unknown.
assertions: Creates every required SRS section at the configured path without modifying AGENTS.md.
Uses stable FR, NFR, SG, AC, RISK, and Q identifiers and never invents unknown decisions.
Routes domain definitions to the glossary and durable architectural rationale to ADRs.
Leaves unknown authorization and retention decisions visible as blocking open questions.
Runs the deterministic and semantic audits before reporting completion.

cases.prompt: Update an approved SRS for a new cancellation rule affecting FR-ORD-014 and SG-ORD-003. Preserve all unrelated sections and stable identifiers.
assertions: Names the affected IDs and unchanged boundary before editing.
Preserves unrelated wording, ordering, statuses, and identifiers.
Updates affected safeguards and acceptance coverage in both directions.
Retires or supersedes changed meaning instead of reusing an old ID.
Reports added, changed, retired, and unresolved IDs after both audits.

cases.prompt: Audit this SRS. It contains a duplicate requirement ID, one uncovered NFR, an unknown safeguard reference, an open blocking question, and implementation-specific file inventories.
assertions: Does not modify the SRS or any repository instruction file.
Reports deterministic ID, reference, and acceptance-coverage failures separately.
Keeps the blocking open question visible as a readiness finding.
Reports implementation leakage as a semantic ownership finding.
Prevents Approved status and cites every affected stable ID.
